composition.Programmer 2: Fix and complete all frontend templates in the templates/ directory according to the specification. Specifically, ensure that the 'dashboard.html' template file is correctly saved inside the 'templates' folder relative to app.py to resolve the TemplateNotFound error. Verify and organize all other HTML templates (create_article.html, edit_article.html, version_history.html, my_articles.html, published_articles.html, content_calendar.html, article_analytics.html) are also correctly placed and use Flask routes for URLs. This task is critical to enable the Flask app to render pages without template loading errors and to meet the original task's page design requirements.
